_comment: Config for the Hydrex LP selection pipeline. Tune thresholds and scoring weights here without touching code.

bootstrap._comment: Parameters for bootstrap_optimize.py. Update hydx_price_usd each epoch before running.
bootstrap._ohydx_discount_note: oHYDX is sold at 30% discount to HYDX spot; 1 oHYDX costs 0.7 × hydx_price_usd to the buyer.
bootstrap._router_tvl_note: Minimum Hydrex pool TVL before meaningful volume routing is expected. Hard-cut trigger if not reached by end of epoch 1.
bootstrap._lp_apr_targets_note: LP APR scenarios to test. Hydrex incentivised pools show 60-122% (screenshot Jun 2026); bootstrap pools (new/risky tokens) should target 80-100%.
bootstrap._tvl_targets_note: TVL levels to show in the oHYDX budget table. Pick a target that gives meaningful routing depth vs the external pool.
bootstrap._cut_thresholds_note: Minimum fees/incentive ratio required at end of each epoch to continue. Epoch 3 must be self-sustaining.

retention_scorecard._comment: Parameters for retention_scorecard.py. Aggregates bootstrap_tracker.csv into a per-pool KEEP/WATCH/CUT call. Weights need not sum to 1 (normalized in code).
retention_scorecard._min_incentive_note: Epochs with incentive below this are excluded from f/i stats (unfunded/stub rows).
retention_scorecard._profit_threshold_note: f/i at or above this counts as a 'profitable' (break-even) epoch.
retention_scorecard._dead_tvl_note: If the latest epoch's avg TVL is below this, the pool is DEAD.
retention_scorecard._min_epochs_note: Pools with fewer funded epochs than this are flagged NEW (insufficient track record).
retention_scorecard._trend_epsilon_note: Change in f/i (latest minus first) beyond this is 'up'/'down', else 'flat'.
retention_scorecard._share_trend_epsilon_note: Change in fee-share-of-market (latest minus first, pct points) beyond this is 'up'/'down'. A pool gaining share is not flagged decaying even if absolute f/i fell (strips market beta). Populate share data with: python retention_scorecard.py --refresh-market.
retention_scorecard._weights_note: efficiency=recency-weighted $Fees/$Incentive; productivity=$Fees/$TVL (Austin's Jun 2026 ranking metric); stickiness=TVL kept vs peak + within-epoch hold; consistency=share of epochs clearing break-even; trend=f/i improving vs decaying.
retention_scorecard._cut_tvl_retention_note: Below this share of peak TVL, a never-profitable pool is a CUT regardless of score.
retention_scorecard._treasury_exclude_note: Pairs/addresses flagged TREASURY: scored but excluded from the incentive-budget call. VVV has a treasury allocation (Austin, Jun 2026).

candidate_filters._comment: Agreed in the Jun 9 2026 Rich<>Austin meeting: strip meme coins and illiquid junk.
candidate_filters._exclude_tokens_note: Austin Jun 2026: pass on AERO pools (conflict-of-interest); UP was in a prior epoch and under-performed.
candidate_filters._max_vol_tvl_24h_note: Exclude pools where 24h volume > 5× liquidity. Extreme vol/TVL (e.g. 10×) signals LP flight or thin liquidity, not genuine trading demand.
candidate_filters._lp_exit_note: Flag (but don't exclude from ranking) pools where today's liquidity < 50% of their 7d rolling average. Signals LP exit rather than noise; flagged pools are shown in top-20 but skipped for top-4 picks.
candidate_filters._inverse_connector_note: Austin's heuristic (Jun 2026): the opposite-base pair of a token's deepest pool is often far more capital-efficient. For each token whose deepest pool clears the standard filter, also admit its USDC/WETH/cbBTC pools above this RELAXED liquidity floor (mcap filter still applies), flagged inverse_connector. Recovers DEGEN/USDC-style thin-but-efficient pairs the $50k floor drops; capped at max_tokens to bound API calls.

discovery._comment: DexScreener has no 'all pairs on a chain' endpoint. We discover via these sources, then filter to chain==base and dedupe by pairAddress.
discovery._discovery_subgraph_ids_note: Subgraphs queried for top-pools-by-volume discovery (schema-agnostic: pools or Messari liquidityPools). [0]=Aerodrome CL (reliable), [1]=Uniswap v3 Base (Messari schema, healthy when its Graph indexers are up — replaces the dead HMuAwufq ID that fee_enrich still uses for 7d data). Separate from config.subgraphs so swapping a discovery source doesn't affect fee enrichment.
discovery._subgraph_pools_note: Broaden discovery beyond DexScreener's trending/boost sample: pull the top-N pools by all-time volume from discovery_subgraph_ids, then hydrate via DexScreener so they carry mcap/age/txns for the filters. Requires THEGRAPH_API_KEY (env locally, repo secret in CI).

fee_enrich._comment: Base RPC used for on-chain fee-tier reads. Override with env BASE_RPC_URL. Algebra pools are read via globalState().lastFee; Uniswap/Aerodrome-style via fee(). V4 pool IDs are bytes32 (66-char hex) — read via StateView.getSlot0().
fee_enrich._uniswap_v4_state_view_note: Base mainnet StateView (verified BaseScan Jun 2026). getSlot0(bytes32 poolId) returns (sqrtPriceX96, tick, protocolFee, lpFee). lpFee is uint24 in millionths, same encoding as V3 fee().

scoring._comment: Transparent weighted score (phase 1). Weights calibrated from Aerodrome proxy ML (14k pool-epochs, ROC-AUC 0.682). Each feature is normalized 0-1 then weighted; weights need not sum to 1.
scoring._weights_rationale: vol_tvl_24h removed Jun 2026: univariate analysis on Aerodrome proxy shows it has near-zero standalone predictive power (AUC 0.483, ρ +0.027) — it is an inferior version of fees_per_tvl_ratio, which captures the same turnover signal but incorporates the fee tier. Its 0.18 weight was moved to fees_per_tvl_ratio (0.28 → 0.46), consistent with logistic regression suggesting fees/TVL as the strongest individual predictor (AUC 0.618).
scoring._low_tvl_threshold_note: Proxy records with TVL below this are used to compute low_tvl_perf. Matches typical Hydrex bootstrap TVL range ($500-$10k in practice, $25k gives adequate sample size).
scoring._major_tokens_note: Tokens considered 'blue chip' for pair_type_score. Pairs with 2 majors score 1.0, 1 major 0.7, 0 majors 0.3.
scoring.primary_lp_share_note: share = our_planned_tvl / (competitor_primary_lp_usd + our_planned_tvl). HOME was profitable because its primary LP was only ~$70k, so a $3k add was a meaningful share.
scoring._min_pick_score_note: A candidate is only badged PICK if its weighted score clears this floor (and is in top_n_picks). Stops the dashboard recommending weak fillers below the natural score cliff — e.g. 2026-06-24 scores were 0.58, 0.57, then 0.22, 0.21; only the top two are real.

hydrex_subgraph._comment: Goldsky subgraph for all Hydrex pools. Queried at score time to exclude pairs that already have a pool on Hydrex.

subgraphs._comment: The Graph subgraph IDs used by fee_enrich.py for 7-day rolling data. Aerodrome is queried first; Uniswap v3/v4 are fallbacks. Requires THEGRAPH_API_KEY env var.
subgraphs._uniswap_v4_base_note: Official Uniswap v4-subgraph deployment on Base (The Graph Explorer, Jun 2026). Schema matches v3: poolDayDatas with pool_in filter and volumeUSD/feesUSD/tvlUSD fields. Pool IDs are bytes32 strings — pass as lowercase hex with 0x prefix.

proxy_dataset._comment: Aerodrome historical pools used as the labeled training set (label = fees > emissions). Pull via the Dune API. Find the numeric query id behind each table on https://dune.com/0xkhmer/aerodrome (open the viz -> 'Query' -> the id in the URL). Set DUNE_API_KEY in env.
